│ MFCG4    │ MetaFac Code Generator 4 (CG4)                                    │
├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Commands │ t2g     Converts a template to a code generator                   │
│          │ g2t     Converts a generator to template                          │
│          │ a2c     Generates source code using the named generator and       │
│          │         supplied metadata.                                        │
│          │ a2j     Generates metadata (JSON) from an assembly.               │
│          │ j2c     Generates source code from JSON metadata.                 │
│          │                                                                   │
│          │ For additional help about a command, use the '--help' option.     │
│          │                                                                   │
│ ExitCode │ 0 (0x00000000)                                                    │
├──────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Credits  │ UI powered by https://www.nuget.org/packages/MetaFac.TinyCLI and  │
│          │ https://www.nuget.org/packages/Spectre.Console                    │
└──────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
